---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this working?

## Example Usage
```bash
# Show how you'd use this feature
kochava --new-feature "example"
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered?

## Benefits
- How does this improve Kochava?
- Who benefits from this?
- Does it align with the FREE local models mission?

## Implementation Notes
Any technical considerations or implementation ideas?

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature
- [ ] I can provide testing and feedback
- [ ] I can help with documentation
